title: Gnarled Hand Limited Summons lower-AL hand creature

card.rawText: Summon a creature with an AL less than your primary creature from your hand as a Limited Summon. If this card is destroyed, send the Limited Summoned creature to your cemetery.

effect.value: Summon a creature with an AL less than your primary creature from your hand as a Limited Summon. If this card is destroyed, send the Limited Summoned creature to your cemetery.

plan.title: Gnarled Hand Limited Summons lower-AL hand creature
plan.summary: Equip Gnarled Hand and verify it can Limited Summon a hand creature with AL less than the equipped primary creature.

notes: Read text first: Summon a creature with an AL less than your primary creature from your hand as a Limited Summon. If this card is destroyed, send the Limited Summoned creature to your cemetery.

steps: Equip Gnarled Hand to the primary creature.
Choose a lower-AL creature from hand as a Limited Summon.
Verify the Limited Summon is source-linked to Gnarled Hand.

expectedAssertions.label: Gnarled Hand Limited Summon route emitted

manualVerification: Confirm AL must be less than the primary creature, not less-than-or-equal.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the deterministic headless route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Equip Gnarled Hand and verify it can Limited Summon a hand creature with AL less than the equipped primary creature.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
